title: 6 wget Commands for Reliable Downloads
summary: Keep downloads moving with practical wget commands for resume support, custom file names, timestamp checks, retries, bandwidth limits, and small site mirrors.
verification_setup: Replace the example URLs before running the commands.
Run file-saving and mirror commands from a writable directory.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/wget_commands_for_reliable_downloads.sh with real download targets.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example URLs with real download targets and run file-saving commands from a writable directory.
